body:
sapphic-dice:

digitalsymbiote:

ladymoonblessed:

sapphic-dice:

People on the internet need to stop calling me a good girl… or I might start to believe them…

That I’m worth more than I’m told I am… that everyone who cares about me outside my family is right. And my family… just doesn’t really like me…

Wren, dear, is that not the point? You are worth more, you do deserve better and we’ll keep telling you that until you believe it.

Seconding this. You are worth more, you deserve better.

And you’re a very good girl 💛

Dnsnskkskkskskkwkrkkekwkskskksskkskkskkskkskskskkwkskskkdkskkskksksksksk thank youndjdjsjjdskksksksksksksk
